hero.tagline: Finding silhouettes in the dark, defining ourselves in melody

about.storyContent1: Silhouette was formed in the summer of 2022, an Indietronica band from China.
about.storyContent2: We pursue a clean and minimalist musical philosophy, weaving melodic bass lines, vintage synthesizer tones, powerful guitar riffs and strong rhythms into the unique sound of Silhouette.
about.storyContent3: In the darkness, silhouettes are how we perceive existence; in music, silhouettes are our language of emotion.
